        + u^9*(7*u^49 - 207*u^48 + 228*u^47 - 2224*u^46 + 2295*u^45 + 1907*u^44 + 481*u^43 + 29500*u^42 - 24815*u^41 + 92245*u^40 - 9086*u^39 - 97512*u^38 + 310765*u^37 - 242368*u^36 + 130055*u^35 + 50596*u^34 - 134790*u^33 + 222157*u^32 - 231471*u^31 + 196087*u^30 - 29441*u^29 - 85713*u^28 + 185192*u^27 - 133786*u^26 + 106373*u^25 - 29614*u^24 + 1531*u^23 + 14787*u^22 + 9809*u^21 - 35018*u^20 + 34422*u^19 - 22137*u^18 - 3454*u^17 + 8886*u^16 - 9965*u^15 + 2783*u^14 + 980*u^13 - 3253*u^12 + 2420*u^11 - 905*u^10 - 75*u^9 + 367*u^8 - 134*u^7 + 29*u^6 + 17*u^5 + 20*u^4 - 16*u^3 + 11*u^2 - 2*u + 1)*v^10
        - u^13*(15*u^45 - 50*u^44 + 8*u^43 - 25*u^42 - 2312*u^41 - 379*u^40 - 6942*u^39 - 4066*u^38 - 2390*u^37 - 26855*u^36 + 65547*u^35 - 77822*u^34 + 22072*u^33 + 62252*u^32 - 93359*u^31 + 98093*u^30 - 60032*u^29 + 31695*u^28 + 1351*u^27 - 38080*u^26 + 59248*u^25 - 58971*u^24 + 59880*u^23 - 57464*u^22 + 45098*u^21 - 4410*u^20 - 13673*u^19 + 33314*u^18 - 19609*u^17 + 10424*u^16 + 3380*u^15 - 4578*u^14 + 4007*u^13 + 378*u^12 - 3301*u^11 + 3545*u^10 - 2378*u^9 + 432*u^8 + 152*u^7 - 237*u^6 - 68*u^5 + 133*u^4 - 137*u^3 + 60*u^2 - 13*u - 1)*v^9
        - u^14*(7*u^44 - 46*u^43 - u^42 - 335*u^41 - 404*u^40 - 68*u^39 - 1879*u^38 + 2747*u^37 - 2699*u^36 + 12866*u^35 + 3766*u^34 - 21409*u^33 + 44287*u^32 - 28019*u^31 + 15458*u^30 + 10734*u^29 - 22645*u^28 + 42354*u^27 - 43996*u^26 + 36335*u^25 - 3745*u^24 - 10571*u^23 + 26273*u^22 - 16518*u^21 + 12708*u^20 - 707*u^19 + 2024*u^18 - 3108*u^17 + 8125*u^16 - 8492*u^15 + 5364*u^14 - 1913*u^13 - 448*u^12 - 154*u^11 + 753*u^10 - 1168*u^9 + 825*u^8 - 374*u^7 + 93*u^6 + 19*u^5 - 17*u^4 + 5*u^3 + 11*u^2 - 6*u + 4)*v^8
        - u^16*(u^42 - 8*u^41 - 25*u^40 - 63*u^39 + 89*u^38 + 102*u^37 + 358*u^36 + 1447*u^35 + 1046*u^34 + 4575*u^33 - 7405*u^32 + 8158*u^31 + 231*u^30 - 6499*u^29 + 11782*u^28 - 11205*u^27 + 8538*u^26 - 1665*u^25 - 2475*u^24 + 8987*u^23 - 8560*u^22 + 10012*u^21 - 10254*u^20 + 10641*u^19 - 7051*u^18 + 1518*u^17 + 1354*u^16 - 2252*u^15 - 629*u^14 + 2110*u^13 - 2772*u^12 + 1792*u^11 - 616*u^10 - 138*u^9 + 274*u^8 - 132*u^7 + 38*u^6 + 40*u^5 - 3*u^4 - 4*u^3 + 8*u^2 - 2*u + 1)*v^7
        + u^18*(7*u^38 - 69*u^36 - 50*u^35 - 344*u^34 - 187*u^33 - 478*u^32 + 1136*u^31 + 335*u^30 - 1900*u^29 + 3245*u^28 - 1501*u^27 - 332*u^26 + 2580*u^25 - 3297*u^24 + 5347*u^23 - 5353*u^22 + 3701*u^21 - 614*u^20 - 109*u^19+ 1416*u^18 + 256*u^17 - 813*u^16 + 1825*u^15 - 1047*u^14 + 397*u^13 + 385*u^12 - 333*u^11 + 102*u^10 + 43*u^9 - 17*u^8 - 151*u^7 + 184*u^6 - 138*u^5 + 66*u^4 - 14*u^3 + u^2 + 1)*v^6
        + u^21*(u^34 - 15*u^33 - 22*u^32 - 53*u^31 + 37*u^30 + 188*u^29 + 344*u^28 - 334*u^27 + 484*u^26 + 231*u^25 - 564*u^24 + 969*u^23 - 840*u^22 + 1181*u^21 - 263*u^20 + 20*u^19 + 425*u^18 + 52*u^17 + 244*u^16 - 171*u^15 + 392*u^14 - 145*u^13 - 16*u^12 + 88*u^11 + 56*u^10 - 333*u^9 + 378*u^8 - 322*u^7 + 200*u^6 - 76*u^5 + 28*u^4 - 17*u^3 + 14*u^2 - 7*u + 4)*v^5
        - u^25*(7*u^28 - 7*u^27 - 25*u^26 - 72*u^25 + 36*u^24 - 51*u^23 - 70*u^22 + 153*u^21 - 55*u^20 - 99*u^19 + 114*u^18 - 173*u^17 + 226*u^16 - 223*u^15 + 106*u^14 - 70*u^13 + 110*u^12 - 103*u^11 + 253*u^10 - 243*u^9 + 275*u^8 - 206*u^7 + 132*u^6 - 69*u^5 + 61*u^4 - 44*u^3 + 27*u^2 - 15*u + 3)*v^4
        + u^25*(8*u^26 - 4*u^25 + 4*u^24 + 5*u^23 - 23*u^22 - 29*u^21 + 44*u^20 - 48*u^19 + 69*u^18 - 132*u^17 + 69*u^16 - 80*u^15 + 53*u^14 - 98*u^13 + 78*u^12 - 90*u^11 + 60*u^10 - 70*u^9 + 50*u^8 - 35*u^7 + 19*u^6 - 8*u^5 + 3*u^4 - 1)*v^3
        - u^29*(2*u^19 + 9*u^18 - 10*u^17 + 11*u^16 - 13*u^15 + 16*u^14 - 9*u^13 + 22*u^12 - 19*u^11 + 27*u^10 - 20*u^9 + 16*u^8 - 9*u^7 + 6*u^6 - 7*u^5 + 2*u - 1)*v^2
        - u^34*(u^14 - u^13 + u^12 - u^11 + u^10 - u^9 + u^8 - u^7 + u^6 - 4*u^5 + u - 2)*v
        + u^39;
G:=1/u;
x:=-v;
y:=(28*G^58*x^30-69*G^58*x^29+45*G^58*x^28-11*G^58*x^27+23*G^58*x^26-16*G^58*x^25+56*G^57*x^34-194*G^57*x^33+284*G^57*x^32-335*G^57*x^31+369*G^57*x^30-324*G^57*x^29+411*G^57*x^28-459*G^57*x^27+257*G^57*x^26-206*G^57*x^25+263*G^57*x^24-175*G^57*x^23+82*G^57*x^22-53*G^57*x^21+40*G^57*x^20-16*G^57*x^19+28*G^56*x^38-125*G^56*x^37+267*G^56*x^36-476*G^56*x^35+680*G^56*x^34-746*G^56*x^33+990*G^56*x^32-1247*G^56*x^31+1223*G^56*x^30-1404*G^56*x^29+1318*G^56*x^28-1022*G^56*x^27+1264*G^56*x^26-1159*G^56*x^25+723*G^56*x^24-689*G^56*x^23+637*G^56*x^22-365*G^56*x^21+128*G^56*x^20-77*G^56*x^19+60*G^56*x^18+8*G^56*x^17-16*G^56*x^16-27*G^55*x^39+65*G^55*x^38-37*G^55*x^37+34*G^55*x^36+58*G^55*x^35-189*G^55*x^34-416*G^55*x^33+1483*G^55*x^32-2392*G^55*x^31+2913*G^55*x^30-2851*G^55*x^29+3370*G^55*x^28-3579*G^55*x^27+2258*G^55*x^26-1602*G^55*x^25+1512*G^55*x^24-639*G^55*x^23-100*G^55*x^22+234*G^55*x^21-130*G^55*x^20+259*G^55*x^19-331*G^55*x^18+122*G^55*x^17-49*G^55*x^16+57*G^55*x^15-16*G^55*x^14+79*G^54*x^39-187*G^54*x^38-469*G^54*x^37+3169*G^54*x^36-8225*G^54*x^35+13570*G^54*x^34-17766*G^54*x^33+21213*G^54*x^32-22254*G^54*x^31+22285*G^54*x^30-21251*G^54*x^29+14493*G^54*x^28-8385*G^54*x^27+6233*G^54*x^26-1717*G^54*x^25-1612*G^54*x^24+1141*G^54*x^23-689*G^54*x^22+759*G^54*x^21-759*G^54*x^20+185*G^54*x^19+249*G^54*x^18+18*G^54*x^17-42*G^54*x^16-77*G^54*x^15+32*G^54*x^14-224*G^53*x^41+1557*G^53*x^40-5103*G^53*x^39+10700*G^53*x^38-17371*G^53*x^37+22317*G^53*x^36-21140*G^53*x^35+17369*G^53*x^34-13186*G^53*x^33+3779*G^53*x^32+7795*G^53*x^31-26735*G^53*x^30+46190*G^53*x^29-46757*G^53*x^28+48710*G^53*x^27-54596*G^53*x^26+42305*G^53*x^25-27432*G^53*x^24+19696*G^53*x^23-11327*G^53*x^22+4172*G^53*x^21-575*G^53*x^20+353*G^53*x^19-312*G^53*x^18-380*G^53*x^17+45*G^53*x^16+180*G^53*x^15-23*G^53*x^14-28*G^52*x^43+173*G^52*x^42-494*G^52*x^41-452*G^52*x^40+6396*G^52*x^39-18930*G^52*x^38+37728*G^52*x^37-59179*G^52*x^36+80064*G^52*x^35-121196*G^52*x^34+188763*G^52*x^33-256213*G^52*x^32+317724*G^52*x^31-3506 5+12339987*G^10*x^14-12043570*G^10*x^13-2220504*G^10*x^12+3604304*G^10*x^11+99946*G^10*x^10-721017*G^10*x^9+41426*G^10*x^8+81455*G^10*x^7-3685*G^10*x^6-3674*G^10*x^5-561*G^10*x^4+55*G^10*x^3+22*G^10*x^2-11*G^10*x+60*G^9*x^35+650*G^9*x^34-3510*G^9*x^33+2620*G^9*x^32+44390*G^9*x^31-22710*G^9*x^30-366090*G^9*x^29-81480*G^9*x^28+2381700*G^9*x^27-162420*G^9*x^26-8518270*G^9*x^25+3258910*G^9*x^24+16980180*G^9*x^23-7324430*G^9*x^22-27620250*G^9*x^21+15002570*G^9*x^20+32134660*G^9*x^19-24391620*G^9*x^18-21583710*G^9*x^17+23367310*G^9*x^16+6915860*G^9*x^15-13101140*G^9*x^14+43480*G^9*x^13+4396370*G^9*x^12-774620*G^9*x^11-922450*G^9*x^10+268550*G^9*x^9+128660*G^9*x^8-45750*G^9*x^7-11360*G^9*x^6+3440*G^9*x^5+360*G^9*x^4+40*G^9*x^3-27*G^8*x^34-486*G^8*x^33+1134*G^8*x^32+270*G^8*x^31-19539*G^8*x^30+55629*G^8*x^29+172215*G^8*x^28-662787*G^8*x^27-173952*G^8*x^26+1529730*G^8*x^25+2804022*G^8*x^24-8928072*G^8*x^23+215361*G^8*x^22+14905836*G^8*x^21-7256853*G^8*x^20-11514123*G^8*x^19+7213122*G^8*x^18+7521336*G^8*x^17-4720653*G^8*x^16-4309290*G^8*x^15+2880882*G^8*x^14+1401453*G^8*x^13-1138410*G^8*x^12-193248*G^8*x^11+223335*G^8*x^10+21510*G^8*x^9-24291*G^8*x^8-9414*G^8*x^7+4302*G^8*x^6+1692*G^8*x^5-648*G^8*x^4-36*G^8*x^3+96*G^7*x^32+344*G^7*x^31+2056*G^7*x^30-14512*G^7*x^29-2384*G^7*x^28-36728*G^7*x^27+470056*G^7*x^26-592144*G^7*x^25-799496*G^7*x^24+754792*G^7*x^23+3206240*G^7*x^22-2928656*G^7*x^21-5520064*G^7*x^20+7114048*G^7*x^19+3529720*G^7*x^18-7755216*G^7*x^17-340816*G^7*x^16+4865736*G^7*x^15-1055648*G^7*x^14-1754488*G^7*x^13+800024*G^7*x^12+248456*G^7*x^11-236000*G^7*x^10+32528*G^7*x^9+21976*G^7*x^8-11576*G^7*x^7+1496*G^7*x^6+296*G^7*x^5-200*G^7*x^4+64*G^7*x^3+7*G^6*x^31-14*G^6*x^30-2583*G^6*x^29+15232*G^6*x^28-8967*G^6*x^27-35147*G^6*x^26-118538*G^6*x^25+465871*G^6*x^24-42105*G^6*x^23-1008973*G^6*x^22+402276*G^6*x^21+1220653*G^6*x^20-232701*G^6*x^19-1726011*G^6*x^18+380086*G^6*x^17+1748341*G^6*x^16-760298*G^6*x^15-920192*G^6*x^14+600852*G^6*x^13+232225*G^6*x^12-241570*G^6*x^11-3367*G^6*x^10+48594*G^6*x^9-13153*G^6*x^8-2506*G^6*x^7+2408*G^6*x^6-371*G^6*x^5-49*G^6*x^4-48*G^5*x^29+624*G^5*x^28-6192*G^5*x^27+11724*G^5*x^26+9042*G^5*x^25+16602*G^5*x^24-215472*G^5*x^23+242694*G^5*x^22+346176*G^5*x^21-705288*G^5*x^20-163074*G^5*x^19+968970*G^5*x^18-240468*G^5*x^17-708024*G^5*x^16+408210*G^5*x^15+233814*G^5*x^14-233304*G^5*x^13+408*G^5*x^12+43584*G^5*x^11-11442*G^5*x^10+2274*G^5*x^9-408*G^5*x^8-612*G^5*x^7+300*G^5*x^6-132*G^5*x^5+42*G^5*x^4-30*G^4*x^27+2430*G^4*x^26-9580*G^4*x^25+7590*G^4*x^24+4620*G^4*x^23+37500*G^4*x^22-108820*G^4*x^21-1245*G^4*x^20+212190*G^4*x^19-63570*G^4*x^18-325880*G^4*x^17+262235*G^4*x^16+181075*G^4*x^15-286590*G^4*x^14+25095*G^4*x^13+112880*G^4*x^12-47790*G^4*x^11-11475*G^4*x^10+11560*G^4*x^9-2020*G^4*x^8-445*G^4*x^7+345*G^4*x^6-75*G^4*x^5+12*G^3*x^26-680*G^3*x^25+3376*G^3*x^24-4524*G^3*x^23-2432*G^3*x^22-96*G^3*x^21+37092*G^3*x^20-60348*G^3*x^19+6128*G^3*x^18+48872*G^3*x^17-8288*G^3*x^16-41412*G^3*x^15+6132*G^3*x^14+35816*G^3*x^13-16552*G^3*x^12-11008*G^3*x^11+8896*G^3*x^10+100*G^3*x^9-1340*G^3*x^8+252*G^3*x^7+4*G^3*x^5+81*G^2*x^24-705*G^2*x^23+1950*G^2*x^22-1974*G^2*x^21+1935*G^2*x^20-9846*G^2*x^19+21744*G^2*x^18-13956*G^2*x^17-14001*G^2*x^16+25509*G^2*x^15-8091*G^2*x^14-7896*G^2*x^13+6066*G^2*x^12-159*G^2*x^11-684*G^2*x^10-24*G^2*x^9-3*G^2*x^8+75*G^2*x^7-21*G^2*x^6-6*G*x^23+120*G*x^22-524*G*x^21+918*G*x^20-716*G*x^19+750*G*x^18-2052*G*x^17+2328*G*x^16+658*G*x^15-3524*G*x^14+2428*G*x^13+366*G*x^12-1184*G*x^11+414*G*x^10+100*G*x^9-92*G*x^8+16*G*x^7-9*x^21+53*x^20-120*x^19+121*x^18-49*x^17+57*x^16-161*x^15+150*x^14+17*x^13-125*x^12+82*x^11-7*x^10-15*x^9+7*x^8-x^7)/x;
r:= (x^2*y - x*y + y - 1) / (x^2*y - x);
s:=(x*y - y + 1) / (x*y);
E:=[s-r*s+1,r*s-r^2*s,r*s-r^2*s,0,0];
P:=[0,0];
